caption: A man wearing a large, grey, textured wig, black-rimmed glasses, and headphones speaks into a professional microphone in what appears to be a studio setting. He is dressed in a white button-down shirt with a red bowtie and brown suspenders. Behind him, the background features walls decorated with framed photographs and clothing on mannequins. On-screen graphics appear on the left and right sides of the frame; the left graphic contains a logo and the text "PODCAST," while the right graphic reads "GOSS TALK JOY" above smaller, less legible text. Throughout the sequence, the man remains in a similar position, speaking and gesturing slightly with his facial expressions as he looks toward someone off-camera. The setting, lighting, and his attire remain constant across the frames.
